Karen is nice because when I started, I got her to e3 pretty quickly from natural rolls. I enjoy getting +3 Arithmetica from her Exalt and healing from all of her cards. That said, I think her healing struggles when I take 400 damage a turn.
Poison isn't really why I keep her
Although, I do like how often I get card draw from her exalt cooking card
It gives a bonus effect at e3, so I sometimes get it to essentially be an enlightenment that can be used 3 times.
In fact, her poison is still nice as I get around 200 from her exalt + cooking (which comes from her exalt)
Over time, that is a big help
If Karen being replaced would help, I wouldn't be opposed, though.
